summary_en: 1,500k shares (1.4% of outstanding), ¥3.0B upper limit, acquisition window May 18, 2026 to Mar 31, 2027, market purchase on TSE. ROE optimization and capital efficiency policy: no unnecessary shareholder capital retention.
title_en: Notice of Determination of Matters Related to Acquisition of Treasury Stock (Acquisition of treasury stock under the Articles of Incorporation pursuant to Article 165, Paragraph 2 of the Companies Act)
translation_en_brief: Nippon Gas announced on May 15, 2026 that its board authorized treasury stock acquisition of up to 1,500k shares (1.4% of issued shares excluding treasury stock) for a maximum aggregate consideration of ¥3.0B. The buyback will be executed via open-market purchases on the Tokyo Stock Exchange between May 18, 2026 and March 31, 2027. The company cited its three-year management plan (FY3/27–FY3/29) in which ROE is positioned as the primary financial KPI, supported by ROIC improvement. The capital policy aims to avoid holding unnecessary shareholder equity while balancing growth investment and enhanced returns to shareholders. As of April 30, 2026, the company held 6.32M treasury shares (including 1.33M held via executive compensation BIP trust) against 106.51M issued shares.
